page_metadata.biotools__summary: Tool that extracts accurate single nucleotide polymorphism genotypes at pre-defined loci from whole genome alignments and presents them in a standard genotyping format compatible with association analysis software and datasets genotyped on commercial array platforms.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Tool that extracts accurate single nucleotide polymorphism genotypes at pre-defined loci from whole genome alignments and presents them in a standard genotyping format compatible with association analysis software and datasets genotyped on commercial array platforms.
